mnemonics.title: BIS Formula
mnemonics.content: **B**ase + **I**ndex × **S**ize = Address. Remember 'BIS' - like 'BUS' that takes you to the right address!

mnemonics.title: FHCR - Array Properties
mnemonics.content: **F**ixed size, **H**omogeneous elements, **C**ontiguous memory, **R**andom access. FHCR - 'Fast Holds Continuous Records'

mnemonics.title: Access vs Insert Rule
mnemonics.content: Arrays are FAST to ACCESS (O(1)) but SLOW to INSERT (O(n)). Think: 'Easy to READ a book page, hard to INSERT a new page in the middle'
